data.name: Infinite Jump
data.detailed_description:
關於這款遊戲
這是一款科幻題材闖關類休閑遊戲，遊戲時長大概半小時左右。
模擬物理類而非益智策略類遊戲，不需要您投入任何學習遊戲規則的成本~

遊戲機製是什麽樣的？
玩家需要通過控製在畫面上不斷前進的小球跳躍障礙物的方式闖關，關卡的難度會逐級上升。在後面的關卡中可以發射子彈。
最後會出現BOSS關卡，玩家需要了解其攻擊方式並擊敗他們。

同一關卡連續失敗3次即可點擊跳過按鈕跳過本關卡。

data.short_description: 《無限跳躍/Infinite Jump》是一款闖關休閑遊戲。在遊戲中玩家需要通過讓小球跳躍過障礙物的方式不斷闖關，遊戲關卡難度會隨著關卡數增加。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 日文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA Gef
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX 11 Sound Device

data.name: Infinite Jump
data.detailed_description:
About this game
This is a casual game with level-based challenges, lasting approximately half an hour. It is a physics simulation game rather than a puzzle or strategy game, so you don't need to invest any effort in learning the game rules.

How to play games
The game mechanics involve controlling a ball that continuously moves forward on the screen and jumping over obstacles to progress through the levels. The difficulty of the levels increases gradually. In later levels, players can shoot projectiles. The game culminates in a boss level where players need to understand their attack patterns and defeat them.

If you fail the same level three times in a row, you can click the skip button to bypass that level.

data.short_description: "Infinite jump"is a breakthrough leisure game. Players need to continuously advance through the levels by making the ball jump over obstacles. The difficulty of the game levels will increase as the number of levels progresses.
